title: Putrajaya Population Surge 2024
snippet: Putrajaya has recorded a significant 5.2% year-on-year population growth in 2024, driven by the relocation of civil service hubs and new residential developments in Presint 18 and 19.

title: Malaysia Demographic Report 2023
snippet: Urbanization trends in Malaysia show a massive shift towards administrative centers. Putrajaya and Cyberjaya have become the fastest-growing townships.

title: Transit Demand in Putrajaya Outpaces Infrastructure
snippet: As Putrajaya's population hits record highs in 2024, commuters are reporting increased waiting times for feeder buses in Presint 11.

title: NEWLY LEARNED: Cyberjaya-Putrajaya Workforce Flow
snippet: New data from 2024 shows 15,000 workers commute daily between Cyberjaya and Putrajaya. Current shuttle services are at 110% capacity during peak hours.

title: NEWLY LEARNED: MRT Putrajaya Line Feedback
snippet: Residents of Presint 9 complain about the 'Last-Mile Gap' to the MRT Putrajaya station. Walking distance exceeds 1.5km with poor shaded walkway coverage.
